summary: Round 19 tracking is live. The card is 2-4 with Storm v Titans live/pending at update time. Prince_of_Penrith is 3rd on 194 points in the supplied tipping-comp ladder, 5 points behind 2nd, so the board now prioritises controlled top-two chase strategy.

scoreboard.note: Correct opener. The Friday lean held despite the Warriors losing Barnett and Capewell from the extended squad.
Correct and emphatic. Cronulla was the best Saturday edge once Jack Bostock dropped out and the Dolphins carried Origin disruption.
Miss. Canberra punished the fragile home lean and turned the middle of the card against us.
Miss. The Tedesco absence did not create enough Parramatta edge.
Miss. Souths edged Newcastle by two and made the 2pm Sunday lean a tipping-comp loss.
Miss. North Queensland won a golden-point thriller, so the 4 Pines home lean failed by one.

liveAlerts.text: Prince_of_Penrith ladder target: 3rd on 194, 5 points behind 2nd and 17 behind 1st from the supplied Round 19 screenshot.
Round 19 card status: Warriors and Sharks correct; Bulldogs, Eels, Knights and Sea Eagles missed; Storm live/pending.
Top-two chase strategy: use one or two controlled differentials per round, not full-card underdog chasing.
Charity ledger remains 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
No Round 19 charity bet is locked; tipping-comp results do not move the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger.
